_comment: Three Experiments exercising the mixed-file (experiment-parameter) classification, reviewed with --allow-experiments. wl SUBSCRIPT-LOADS (its parent.js has loadSubScript), so content/legacy-entry.js and the content/legacy-core.js it loadSubScripts run as privileged core -> EXEMPT (messenger.msgHdrFromURI is NOT flagged). ui loads its page into a WebExtension <browser> (baseURI.resolve), so content/uipage.js is WebExtension code -> CHECKED (browser.bogusApi IS flagged). mystery is UNSURE (neither pattern), so content/maybe.js is deferred -> messenger.bogusThing NOT flagged now, with an 'unsure' note in the activity feed. Control: browser.controlBogus in the WebExtension background.js IS flagged.
